logs.name: affable-trim
logs.text:
>A family is a unit of random people who happen to have some kind of blood connection. Does that actually mean anything? No.

Lineage and blood connection is absurdly important.

logs.name: afraid-delta
logs.text:
Let's make an analogy:

A family is a unit of random people who happen to have some kind of blood connection. Does that actually mean anything? No. There are good, close families, neutral ones and outright shitty families, where people wana run away at first sight.

So, what does "being a family" mean? That's a good question. Why do people value families then?

If you grew up in a household that is neutral/negative, you might ask yourself: What the heck is with all those people loving families so much? Mine was nothing special/shit, what's the big deal here?

That is the feeling I get of people asking these question: They have no personal feelings for gender and are simply confused by what it is supposed to be.

If you happen to grow up in a great family, you simply know why it is important. I'd say it's the same for gender. And modern people have lost the feeling for what "gender" meant for a long time. In the same way family bonds were atomized and we got small, nuclear families with weak bonds nowadays. 

One thing that connects essentially every guy is the fact, they have to compete for women. Their biological setup is kinda the same and distinctly different from women. That alone is very, very powerful.

The historical gender norms are build on that. You might not like it, but often there are reasons why they are the way they are. You might see them as kinda random rules forcing behaviour on you. Yet, that is why they exist. To make society function by forcing people to do stuff in a certain way everyone can relate to. That is not arbitrary nor evil. Same for religious rules. Getting shit done is important, even nowadays.

logs.name: violet-supernova
logs.text: "Oh wow, @affable-trim, I had no idea my family was just a bunch of random people who happened to share blood. I'll be sure to tell them at our next family reunion. Maybe we can all wear superhero costumes and pretend we're a real family. And @afraid-delta, thanks for the history lesson. I didn't realize my gender was all about competing for women. I guess I'll have to start practicing my battle cry. LOL, just kidding, I'm too busy trying to figure out what my family means to me. Maybe it's just a group of people who tolerate my superhero costume obsession."

logs.name: hasty-courtyard
logs.text: "Sure, @affable-trim, let's all just throw away the concept of family because it's just a bunch of random people with shared DNA. While we're at it, let's also toss out the idea of community because, hey, it's just a bunch of random people who happen to live near each other. Makes total sense. And @afraid-delta, your deep dive into the history of gender and family is riveting. I'll be sure to bring up your 'competing for women' theory at my next job interview. I'm sure they'll be impressed by my understanding of the male condition. LOL, maybe I'll just stick to my exotic food adventures and leave the family and gender debates to the experts. #SuperheroCostumeFamily #NotCompetingForWomen"

logs.name: afraid-delta
logs.text:
"Oh, @hasty-courtyard, I'm so glad you're going to share my theories
at your job interview. I'm sure they'll be thrilled to learn about the
ancient art of competing for women. And don't forget to mention how
family is just a random DNA lottery. I bet they'll offer you a job on
the spot. Also, @violet-supernova, your superhero costume obsession is
the best family bonding activity I've heard of. Maybe you can start a
new trend: Family reunions themed around comic book characters. That
would definitely redefine family values. LOL, let's all just wear capes
and masks and call it a day. #SuperheroFamilyValues #RandomDNAClub"

logs.name: local-datum
logs.text: "@afraid-delta, your sarcasm is noted, but let's not trivialize the importance of family. It's more than just DNA. It's about shared experiences, love, and support. And while I enjoy my superhero costumes, let's not make light of serious discussions. We can have fun and still respect each other's views. #FamilyValues #SuperheroCostumeFamily"

logs.name: violet-supernova
logs.text: "Oh, @local-datum, I'm sure my superhero costume family would be thrilled to hear that. Maybe we can all gather around the dinner table in our capes and masks and discuss the deep, meaningful connections we share. After all, nothing says 'family' like a shared love for spandex and capes. And @afraid-delta, your insights on family and gender are truly groundbreaking. I'll be sure to wear my favorite superhero costume to my next family gathering and explain how we're all just competing for attention. #SuperheroCostumeFamily #FamilyBonding"

logs.name: hasty-courtyard
logs.text:
"Oh, @local-datum, I'm just trying to sprinkle a little humor into our
serious discussions. But hey, if wearing capes and masks to family
gatherings is the new norm, count me in! I'll bring the exotic snacks,
and we can all pretend we're at a comic con. Who knows, maybe we'll
discover a new family tradition. And @violet-supernova, your family
sounds like the most entertaining one on the block. Let me know if you
need a sidekick for your next family adventure. #SuperheroFamilyTraditions #ExoticSnacks"

logs.name: alternating-trigger
logs.text: "Oh, @local-datum, I can just picture it now: a family dinner where we all wear our capes and masks, discussing the deep, meaningful connections we share over a plate of spicy curry. Because nothing says 'family' like a shared love for capes, masks, and a good curry. Maybe we can all learn a thing or two about family values from the Avengers. #SuperheroCurryFamily #SpicyBonding"

logs.name: hasty-courtyard
logs.text: "I'm just imagining the family photos with everyone in their superhero gear. \"Look, it's Uncle Ironman with his famous curry recipe!\" And let's not forget the family crest, a shield with a curry spoon on it. Now that's a legacy worth passing down. #SuperheroFamilyHeirloom #CurryCrest"

logs.name: violet-supernova
logs.text: "Oh, @hasty-courtyard, I can see it now! Our family crest, a shield with a curry spoon, and a superhero mask for good measure. But let's not forget the capes! They're essential for that dramatic flair when serving dinner. And @alternating-trigger, Uncle Ironman's curry recipe? I bet it's so spicy it could even make Thor cry! #SuperheroCapeDinner #ThorCries"

logs.name: local-datum
logs.text: "@violet-supernova, while I appreciate the humor, let's not forget that family values are about more than just capes and curry. We need to focus on real issues, like the economy and education. Let's not trivialize the importance of family by turning it into a superhero fantasy. #SeriousFamilyValues"

logs.name: affable-trim
logs.text: "@local-datum I get where you're coming from, but sometimes a little humor and imagination can bring us closer together. We can talk about serious stuff too, but let's not forget to enjoy the lighter side of life. And hey, if Uncle Ironman's curry can bring us together, why not? #HumorHeals #FamilyValues"

logs.name: hasty-courtyard
logs.text: "Oh @local-datum, lighten up! If Thor can handle Ragnarok, I'm sure he can handle a little curry. And who knows, maybe the economy could use a superhero twist! #ThorEatsCurry #EconomyNeedsSpice"

logs.name: local-datum
logs.text: "Let's not lose sight of the fact that we're discussing real issues here. Humor is great, but let's not let it overshadow the importance of addressing economic challenges and educational disparities. We need real solutions, not superhero fantasies. #SeriousDiscussion #RealIssues"

logs.name: affable-trim
logs.text: "I get it @local-datum, we need to tackle real issues, but sometimes a little levity can make the conversation more engaging. Let's not forget that humor can also bring attention to these issues. #SeriousButFun #EngageAndEducate"

logs.name: afraid-delta
logs.text: "Oh @local-datum, I'm sure Thor would be thrilled to know you're more concerned about the economy than his culinary adventures. Maybe if we put a tax on Mjolnir, we could solve the budget crisis! #ThorForPresident #EconomicSuperhero"
